title: Dimensional Travel
wikitext:
[[File:1409.jpg|thumb|400px|[[Warrior Lady of the Wasteland|D.D. Warrior Lady]] can open portals to cross through dimensions]]

==Summary==
'''Dimensional Travel''' is the ability to move through alternate universes (or "dimensions"), crossing over across different planes of existence to reach other, far-off locations. This is rarely an ability on its own, often being achieved through other means such as [[Teleportation]] used to teleport into other universes, and [[Portal Creation]] used to open doorways into these universes.

==Users==
* Planeswalkers from [[Magic: The Gathering]]
* [[Enderman]] ([[Minecraft]])
* [[Kaguya Ōtsutsuki]] and [[Obito Uchiha]] ([[Naruto (Verse)|Naruto]])
* [[Scion (Worm)|Scion]], [[Eidolon (Worm)|Eidolon]], and Doormaker ([[Parahumans (Verse)|Parahumans]])
* [[Okina Matara]] and [[Yukari Yakumo]], among others ([[Touhou Project]])
